The Catalogue

Experiences for every kind of team

We first identify what is blocking your team from performing at your expectations and work backwards to deliver engagements that super-interactive and get you guaranteed participation

Active & Physical

Bodies weren't built for desks - our movement-based team sessions spike energy, build real recall, and give your team something to talk about long after the day ends.

Yoga
Ergonomics
Stepathon (App Based)
Circuit Challenge
Office Olympics
Grooves - Zumba & Dance
Self Defense & Kickboxing

Mental & Wellbeing

Burnout doesn't announce itself - our sessions pair sharp, actionable insights with activities that shift behaviour, not just awareness.

Sound Therapy
Women's Mental Health
Guided Meditation
Emotional Intelligence
Digital Detox

Creative

Real connection happens when people create together - not over pizza and small talk.

Canvas Painting
Tote Bag Painting
Pottery
Sculpting
Resin Jewellery
Tea Blending
Make Your Own Perfume
Mug Painting
Caricature Making

Personal Growth

The best retention strategy is growth - our sessions give your team the tools, mindset, and confidence to actually move forward.

Financial Planning
Myth Buster
Emotional Intelligence & Self Awareness
Reading Food Labels
Grooming

Learning & Development

70% of engagement runs through your managers - we train them to coach, connect, and drive performance that compounds.

AI Upskilling
Communication - Sales, Stakeholder, Team
New Manager Training
Leadership Skills
Engagement Pillars

Every experience maps to a real outcome

Nine pillars covering the complete spectrum of employee wellbeing - physical, emotional, creative, and professional growth.

Physical Fitness

Get teams moving through challenges that energise the body and create real bonds

Emotional Wellbeing

Customised sessions helping employees recognise and manage negative emotions

Women

Dedicated experiences celebrating and empowering women professionals

Leadership

Influence, decision-making, and leadership through pure experiential learning

Communication

Build collaboration and effective communication skills across the floor

Team Building

Shared challenges that forge connections no offsite can replicate

Creativity

Art, pottery, and hands-on workshops that free the mind from screens

Health

Body scans, check-ups, myth-busting - knowledge that actually drives action

Yoga & Meditation

Breathwork, mindfulness, and flexibility customised to your team's job roles

Testimonials

Don't just take our word for it

"

Amazing design of the session built with AI prompts, polling and reading labels which made the session actually feel actionable. Usually it's a big task just to get even 10 people to participate and this time we saw 50+ people interacting.

Ginny Tewatia
Chief of Staff, Probo
"

We have tried several online sessions but it has been a struggle to actually get people engaged being a remote team. With these sessions - we are seeing 50%+ participation with people actually talking with cameras on.

Kaushal Kumar
Head of Product & Ops, BeatRoute
"

Through the Convrse Circuit Challenge, we have seen almost 90% of the team participating and focussing on fitness for 15 days. We have seen real impact from skills sessions as well through the 1:1 follow up checkins.

Vikrant Singh
CEO, Convrse Spaces
"

The Yoga Day celebrations across Chennai, Bangalore, and Hyderabad were a huge success. The trainers were extremely professional and kept everyone engaged throughout. Tanvi's design & coordination ensured everything ran smoothly. We look forward to many more collaborations.

Sirshitha
HR Manager, InCred Finance
"

This is the second time we are working with Sowaka and they always thoughtfully engage our team. They actually deliver on the brief and created a space where people open up.

Ashish V.
Head HR, Elevate Homes
